an10.145:1.1:
"Bhikkhus, I will teach you the noble path and the ignoble path.
Listen and attend closely …. And what, bhikkhus, is the ignoble path? Wrong view … and wrong liberation. This is called the ignoble path.
an10.145:1.2: "And what, bhikkhus, is the noble path? Right view … and right liberation. This is called the noble path."
